title: The Wandering Mystic
intro: A hooded mystic comes to Runehold's gate — no cult's colour, no coven's mark — and offers to teach the coven an old rite for drawing mana out of still air. The rite, she warns, asks a steady and believing hand; a wavering one it punishes.

advisors.text: Free knowledge from a stranger is rarely free, Archon — but if the rite is true, it is ours to keep. Weigh whether our discipline is equal to it.

win.text: The coven takes the rite to heart, and by the third night mana rises from empty air at a word. A gift worth the risk.
win.saga: A wandering mystic taught the coven a rite to draw mana from still air, and your faith was steady enough to hold it.

lose.text: The rite asks more steadiness than the coven can muster, and it unravels in their hands — days wasted, and confidence with them.
lose.saga: The mystic's mana-rite unravelled in unsteady hands, and the coven lost days and heart to it.

choices.label: Pay her to gather for you instead

win.text: You pay the mystic's price and she works alone for a season, leaving your reserves fuller and asking nothing more.
win.saga: You paid the wandering mystic to gather mana for a season rather than risk the rite yourselves.
